title: Locking device in a compensation nut
abstract: LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT, of the type used to secure a part or applied object to a first structure, the said structure having to preserve the distance separating it from another second structure or attachment support, the said separation distance varying for each applied object, the said compensation nut (1) being formed of a first nut (2) and a bolt (3) which can be adjusted with respect to the nut, in which there is a closed position formed by a flexible arm (26) having a zone of movement and engagement (27) enclosing a flange (35) of said adjustable bolt (3), the said engagement preventing accidental expansion of the distance between the said nuts (2) and bolt (3).
claims:
Claims 1.- LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT, of the type of nuts used to secure a part or applied object to a first structure, the said structure making it necessary to maintain the distance separating it from another second structure or attachment support, the said separation distance varying according to each applied object, the said compensation nut (1) being formed of a nut (2) and an adjustable bolt (3), the said compensation nut (1) being of metal material, characterized in that the said locking device is of metal and forms an integral part of the said compensation nut (1), because the said locking is flexible and is achieved through a stop (32') and a tongue (32) in the said adjustable bolt (3) acting against a flexible arm (26) located in the said nut (2), making possible a locking position in which the distance of separation between the said nut (2) and the said adjustable bolt (3) is locked, a force at least corresponding to the screwing of an applied object into the said compensation nut (1) being necessary in order to overcome the said locked or closed position. 2.- LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to the previous claim, characterized in that the said flexible arm (26) cannot move beyond the said stop (32') of the said adjustable bolt (3) , preventing an excessively tight locked position between the said nut (2) and the said adjustable bolt (3) . 3.- LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to 

any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the said flexible arm (26) has a zone of movement and engagement (27) which encloses the said tongue (32) of the said adjustable bolt (3) , the said engagement preventing accidental expansion of the distance between the said nut (2) and the said adjustable bolt (3) and forming the closed or locked position of the said compensation nut (1) . 4.- LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to the preceding claim, characterized in that the said arm (26) has at its extremity a stop (28) in the form of a fold which holds it away from the said adjustable bolt (3), in such a way that pressing the said tongue (32) closer to and against the said stop (28) bends the said arm (26), allowing the said tongue (32) to reach the said zone of movement and engagement (27) and achieving the closed position for the nut. 5.- LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the extremity of the said flexible arm (26) has an extremity (28') of the said flexible arm (26) against which the said stop (32') acts. 6. - LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the said arm (26) has reinforcement in the form of ribs (29 and 29') in any of its parts. 7. - LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to any of the preceding claims, characterized in that the 

said nut (2) of the said compensation nut (1) comprises a base (21) from which descend flexible tabs comprising a first downward section (23) and a second upward section (24) divided into two parts, at the extremities of which there are locking stops (25' ) or surfaces (25) , the said locking stops (25' ) or surfaces (25) being obtained by folding. 8.- LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to the preceding claim, characterized in that the said nut (2) of the said compensation nut (1) includes a cylinder (22) with an inner thread and the said arm (26), both emerging from the said surface (21) . 9.- LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the said adjustable bolt (3) has a surface (31) from which extends an outer threaded cylinder (34), also having friction or engaging elements in an axial inner space for the passage of a fixing bolt for an applied obj ect . 10. - LOCKING DEVICE IN A COMPENSATION NUT according to the preceding claim, characterized in that the said tongue (32) is a downward projecting protuberance from the said surface (31) . 11. - LOCKING DEVICE FOR A COMPENSATION NUT according to the preceding claim, characterized in that the said inner friction or engaging elements comprise inner engaging tabs (33) .
